Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: Delays near Ashland affecting Green Line Service
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are experiencing a delay near Ashland due to signal problems. Updates to follow as we work to restore service. Seek alternative routes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are experiencing a delay near Ashland due to signal problems. Update to follow.

Personnel are working to restore service and provide service alternatives until the issue is resolved and we hope to resume service shortly.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include using buses that reach Blue Line stations on the Forest Park branch for service into downtown, or east-west service on the #20 Madison or #21 Cermak, for example.

Updates will be posted as new information becomes available.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Midway-bound Orange Line trains are standing Both Directions due to Weather.
ShortDescription:
Midway-bound Orange Line trains are standing Both Directions due to Weather.
Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orang trains are standing due to weather

At this time, also consider other alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.
